svg.title: Satu vending machine — complete screen hierarchy
svg.desc: Full state machine flow from power-on through all donor screens, service mode tabs, and backend states

g.text: gold confirm bar at bottom, 5s timeout
water card has gold border, +20 THB shown
relay fires, LED zone pulses yellow
watches IR beam for item drop
gold footer "Thank you for your donation"

svg.text: What does not exist yet (R4 must build)
A Setup code screen — pending status shows nothing today
B Service mode PIN numpad overlay — gesture enters STATE_SERVICE but draws nothing
C All 5 service mode tabs — not drawn at all
D Selection countdown bar — bar exists but no visible timer on confirm screen
E QR image from URL — shows white box; no HTTP fetch, no PNG/JPEG render
G NVS config cache — idle_timeout, sacred_water, lucky_number not cached from /hello
H /hello config fields — backend hardcodes not sent yet
Status bar: 44px tall. SATU(sz3) + label(sz2) + device_id(sz1) + WiFi OK(sz1) — fits OK
Product name: size 1 = 8px — likely too small to read at kiosk distance ⚠
Gift option: card 280×200 side by side — total 640px, fits 800px screen ✓
QR screen: left panel 540px wide, QR area 240px — slightly cramped for text ⚠
Confirm bar text: "Tap again to confirm | Wait 5s to cancel" at size 2 = ~504px → fits barely ⚠
Service tabs: 5 tabs on 800px = 160px each — OK if short labels (SELF TEST / FREE PLAY etc)
Completion lucky number: size 8 = 64px — dominant, unmissable ✓
Slot number badge: 11px radius circle — small but usable ✓
Bugs found in current local files
satu_vending.ino calls idleAnimation() — but ui.h defines idleAnimationUI()
laneErrorCount[NUM_SLOTS] in .ino — NUM_SLOTS=10, but comment says MAX_SLOTS_HW ⚠ mismatch
_proceedToPayment() and _onPaymentConfirmed() used before declaration — needs forward decl
STATE_SERVICE case missing from switch — gesture fires setState() but nothing draws
QR screen: drawQrScreen() receives qr_code_url (http://…) as qrData for QRCode lib
state_machine.h: laneErrorCount/laneDisabled externs missing — link error if used in service mode
config.h still defines COMMAND_POLL_INTERVAL — .ino redefines it locally, potential conflict
HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL in config.h = 300000 (5min), .ino uses this correctly ✓
NVS key table — all keys pre-defined for R4
CC must use ONLY these strings — any longer key silently fails on ESP32 NVS
namespace "satu" + key must total ≤ 15 chars each independently
QR image format decision (must decide before CC)
Option A: use PNGdec lib (install separately) — fetches Omise PNG url, decodes, renders
Option B: change fake gateway to serve JPEG → use TJpgDec already in Arduino_GFX (simpler)
